name: Beneficiary Inconsistent Treatment Election

eligibility.description: Beneficiaries of estates or trusts who believe the entity's reporting of an item is incorrect.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a beneficiary to treat an item on their tax return differently than how the estate or trust reported it on the Schedule K-1, provided they notify the IRS of the inconsistency.
